failures.message: sourcing_resilience passed before prerequisite component_provenance passed
pin_symbol_footprint passed before prerequisite component_provenance passed
power_tree_integrity passed before prerequisite component_provenance passed

design_goal: cross-domain hardware candidate for evidence-backed promotion

physical_oracle_gaps: SI/PI, EMI/EMC, thermal load behavior, vibration, ingress, connector fatigue, and board bring-up still require simulation or physical evidence outside this digital candidate.

promotion.rule: Only candidates with passing required gates, resolved critical assumptions, and complete artifact integrity can be promoted.

relative_placement.style: constraint-derived component positions with provenance, not raw native PCB geometry

native_outputs.cad_exports: generated from the mechanical contract and board STEP evidence
native_outputs.firmware_build_inputs: generated from the same pinmap used by electrical and firmware parity checks
native_outputs.kicad_and_fabrication: generated evidence artifacts; not the primary authoring representation

semantic_representation.purpose: LLM-facing semantic representation. Native EDA, CAD, firmware, and manufacturing outputs are generated from typed artifacts rather than treated as the primary prompt surface.

representation_contract.grounding: component records carry curated component IDs, MPNs, packages, and footprints
representation_contract.pin_wiring: nets enumerate component refs plus pin names, pin numbers, roles, and MCU pins; semantic_schematic.py round-trips to the JSON model
representation_contract.placement: placements and constraints preserve provenance for relative layout reasoning
